title: AI Drawing Robot for Kids for $70 + free shipping
description: Aimed at kids ages 3 to 8 who are drawn to hands-on creative play, this robot guides children through drawing steps in a way that builds basic motor skills and pattern recognition. It's currently $30 off the $100 list price at $70. Clip the $10 off coupon on the page and apply code "KKLX8YGU" for a savings of $30. title: EU chief says Europe, US need to be ‘strong partners in AI’
description: article author: AFP ID: 1781701260251647600 Wed, 2026-06-17 17:31 EVIAN, France: Europe and the United States must work closely together on artificial intelligence, European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen said on Wednesday, after US giant Anthropic blocked AI models over national security concerns. “The US and EU need to be strong partners in AI,” she told G7 and tech leaders including Anthropic chief Dario Amodei in the French lakeside resort of Evian. “It is in our mutual interest that our citizens and companies can safely use the best AI models,” she added. Main category: World Tags: G7 European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen AI US

title: WitnessAI Agentic Control secures AI agents, tools, and MCP server access
